posts.author: jperminas (Jenna Perminas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’ve successfully developed an automated email via Outlook for a board (Work Management), and it’s working great. The only downside is that the Monday link to update a task comes in as plain text, requiring users to copy/paste. We’re trying to increase adoption, not decrease. Has anyone figured out a way to do this?

I don’t want to use Monday’s automated email, since the subject isn’t customizable (but it has the open task button right in the email, which is what I want in the outlook integration!!)
